hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle:
Challenging unmet medical needs with
innovative recombinant protein biologics

ceo.title: CEO Message
ceo.message:
Since its founding in 2017, CONNEXT has been developing innovative biopharmaceuticals in immuno-oncology and regenerative medicine based on recombinant protein technology. Our core technology platforms — TLR5 agonist and collagenase — hold the potential to address unmet medical needs for patients worldwide.

Our team, guided by scientific rigor and patient-centric values, is driving clinical development at a global level. We will continue to lead the future of the bio industry with innovation and trust.
ceo.name: CEO

meta.title: Science & Pipeline
meta.description: CONNEXT's core technology platforms and pipeline status

hero.title: Science & Pipeline
hero.subtitle:
Developing innovative biologics through
two core platform technologies

tlr5.title: TLR5 Agonist Platform
tlr5.subtitle: Recombinant TLR5 agonist-based immune modulation therapeutics
tlr5.step1Desc: Binds to TLR5 receptors to activate innate immune response
tlr5.step2Desc: Induces secretion of immunomodulatory cytokines to optimize immune response
tlr5.step3Desc: Normalizes immune function to achieve therapeutic outcomes

collagenase.title: Collagenase Platform
collagenase.subtitle: World's first recombinant collagenase-based therapeutics
collagenase.description:
Utilizing microbial expression systems for recombinant collagenase production,
achieving higher purity and consistent quality compared to animal-derived collagenase
